projectInstructions: Follow Dealix OS Sovereign architecture. Do not execute DB changes directly; use action dispatchers. Ensure Universal JSON Output Contract.

customCommands.name: repo-map
customCommands.description: Generates a comprehensive layout of the core OS structure including agents and memory.

customCommands.name: canary-check
customCommands.description: Runs local tests before allowing any production deployment simulation.

customCommands.name: security-preflight
customCommands.description: Pre-commit security validation against known PDPL patterns.

PreToolUse.description: Require unit tests and audit logging before interacting directly with code promotion.

PostToolUse.description: Ensure newly written markdown or python files follow architectural constraints.
